login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access Imagor Studio
login.loginFailed: Invalid username or password. Please try again.

validation.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 3 characters
validation.usernameMaxLength: Username must be at most 30 characters

embedded.tokenMissing: Missing authentication token. Embedded mode requires a JWT token in the URL. Expected format: /?token=YOUR_JWT_TOKEN&path=image.jpg
embedded.tokenInvalid: Invalid or expired authentication token. Please check your JWT token and try again.
embedded.authenticationFailed: Embedded authentication failed. Please verify your token is valid and has not expired.
embedded.pathMissing: Path parameter is required. Expected format: /?token=YOUR_JWT_TOKEN&path=image.jpg
embedded.pathInvalid: Invalid path format. Expected: gallery/folder/image.jpg or image.jpg

validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least {{min}} characters
validation.displayNameMinLength: Display name must be at least 3 characters long
validation.displayNameMaxLength: Display name must be less than 100 characters
validation.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 3 characters
validation.usernameMaxLength: Username must be at most 30 characters
validation.usernamePattern: Username can only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long
validation.passwordMaxLength: Password must be less than 72 characters
validation.confirmPasswordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long
validation.confirmPasswordMaxLength: Password must be less than 72 characters

authCallback.title: Welcome back
authCallback.subtitle: We couldn't complete your sign-in. Please try again.

error.forbiddenDescription: You're signed in, but this space is not available to your account. Ask a space admin for access or return to your workspace.

profile.title: Account
profile.displayNameDescription: Your public display name shown throughout the app.
profile.emailChangeManaged: Email changes and verification are managed by your sign-in provider for now.
profile.emailVerificationRequired: Email verification is required after changing your address.
profile.emailVerificationPending: A confirmation step is required before the new email is used.
profile.emailChangeHelp: We'll keep your current email until the new address is confirmed.
profile.emailAlreadyInUse: This email is already in use
profile.usernameDescription: Used for login. Can contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.
profile.securitySettingsDescription: Manage your account security and password.
profile.signInMethodDescription: How you currently authenticate to this account.
profile.manageSignInDescription: Review linked providers and remove ones you no longer need.
profile.unlinkNotAvailable: Account unlinking is not available yet.
profile.unlinkProviderDescription: You can unlink a provider if another sign-in method remains available.
profile.unlinkLastProviderWarning: You cannot unlink your last remaining sign-in method.
profile.passwordNotSetDescription: No password set for this account yet.

profile.setPasswordDescription: Create a password so you can also sign in without your provider.
profile.usernameAlreadyInUse: This username is already in use
profile.titleDescription: Manage your account information, login methods, and security settings.

admin.title: Admin

systemSettings.title: System Settings
systemSettings.description: Configure system-wide settings. These options are only available to administrators.

homeTitle.label: Home Title
homeTitle.description: Customize the title shown for the home page in navigation and breadcrumbs

appTitle.label: App Title
appTitle.description: Custom application name shown in the navigation bar, browser tab, and all brand links (requires license)

appUrl.label: App URL
appUrl.description: URL opened when users click the app title (requires license)

defaultLanguage.label: Default Language
defaultLanguage.description: Set the default language for the application

guestMode.label: Public Access
guestMode.description: Allow people without an account to browse this gallery. Public users cannot upload, edit, or manage content.

defaultSorting.label: Default File Sorting
defaultSorting.description: Choose how files and folders are sorted by default

showFileNames.label: Show File Names
showFileNames.description: Display file names on image thumbnails in the gallery by default

videoThumbnailPosition.label: Video Thumbnail Position
videoThumbnailPosition.description: Choose where to extract video thumbnails. First frame is fastest. Seek options help get a more representative frame and avoid black frames.

storage.title: Storage Configuration
storage.description: Manage where your images and files are stored. Changes may require a server restart.

admin.setupDescription: Let's get your image gallery set up in just a few steps
admin.guestModeDescription: Allow people without an account to browse this gallery. Public users cannot upload, edit, or manage content.
admin.homeTitleDescription: Customize the title displayed for the home/root folder in the gallery
admin.systemSettingsDescription: These settings can be changed later in admin panel
admin.storageDescription: Configure where your images will be stored
admin.storageConfiguredRestart: Storage configured successfully Please restart the server to apply changes.

sectionDescriptions.general: Configure platform-wide settings. These options are only available to administrators.
sectionDescriptions.storage: Configure the default storage backend for platform-managed spaces.
sectionDescriptions.imagor: Configure imagor image processing and URL signing defaults for the platform.
sectionDescriptions.license: Manage your license key and view your current plan.

storageTypeSelector.fileStorageDescription: Store images on the local file system
storageTypeSelector.s3StorageDescription: Store images in Amazon S3 or compatible cloud storage

storage.dirPermissionsDescription: Permissions for creating new directories (octal format, e.g., 0755)
storage.filePermissionsDescription: Permissions for writing new files (octal format, e.g., 0644)
storage.baseDirDescription: The directory where images will be stored on the file system
storage.bucketDescription: The name of your S3 bucket where images will be stored
storage.regionDescription: AWS region where your bucket is located (e.g., us-east-1, eu-west-1)
storage.customEndpointDescription: Custom S3 endpoint for S3-compatible services (leave empty for AWS S3)
storage.forcePathStyleDescription: Enable for MinIO and LocalStack. Most other S3-compatible services work better with this disabled.
storage.accessKeyIdDescription: AWS access key ID (leave empty to use IAM roles or environment variables)
storage.secretAccessKeyDescription: AWS secret access key (leave empty to use IAM roles or environment variables)
storage.sessionTokenDescription: AWS session token (only required for temporary credentials)
storage.baseDirectoryDescription: Optional prefix for all object keys in the bucket (e.g., "images/")
storage.testConfigurationFirst: Please fill in the {{storageType}} storage configuration first
storage.configurationOverridden: Storage configuration is managed by external configuration
storage.takingEffect: Settings saved. Changes may take up to 1 minute to take effect.
storage.testConfigFirst: Please fill in the {{storageType}} storage configuration first
storage.storageTypeDescription: Select where images and files will be stored

s3Requirements.permissions: Bucket access must allow listing, reading, writing, and deleting objects.
s3Requirements.cors: Add <1>{{origin}}</1> to your bucket CORS allowed origins and allow <2>PUT</2> uploads.

validationErrors.endpointUnreachable: Could not reach the S3 endpoint. Check the bucket name, region, and endpoint URL.
validationErrors.invalidAccessKey: The access key ID format looks invalid.
validationErrors.invalidRegion: The region looks invalid. Check the S3 region field.
validationErrors.accessDenied: Access was denied. Check the bucket permissions and credentials.
validationErrors.authentication: Could not authenticate to S3. Check the access key ID and secret access key.
validationErrors.timeout: Connecting to S3 timed out. Check the bucket name, region, endpoint, and network access.
validationErrors.cors: Browser upload was blocked. Check the bucket CORS settings for this app URL.

systemSettings.settingOverridden: This setting is overridden by configuration file or environment variable
systemSettings.licenseRequired: A valid license is required to use this setting

imagor.imagorConfigurationDescription: Configure image processing settings. Imagor handles image transformations and optimizations.
imagor.secretDescription: Leave empty and we'll generate a secure signing key for you automatically.
imagor.signerTypeDescription: Hash algorithm used for URL signing
imagor.signerTruncateDescription: Shorten the URL signature to this length in characters. Smaller values make URLs shorter but reduce security. Use 0 for the full signature.
imagor.configurationOverridden: Imagor configuration is managed by external configuration
imagor.takingEffect: Settings saved. Changes may take up to 1 minute to take effect.

license.licenseManagementDescription: Manage your Imagor Studio license and view license information.
license.configurationOverridden: License configuration is managed by external configuration
license.activationSuccess: Thank you for your support! License activated successfully.
license.updateSuccess: License updated successfully Thank you for your continued support.
license.updateDialogDescription: Enter a new license key to update your current license.
license.activateDialogDescription: Enter your license key to activate Imagor Studio.
license.newLicenseKeyDescription: Paste your new license key here. This will replace your current license.
license.licenseKeyDescription: Paste your license key here to activate Imagor Studio.
license.registerDescription: Enter your license key to activate Imagor Studio.
license.supportTitle: 💝 Support Imagor Studio - from the creator of imagor
license.creatorStory: We were serving millions of images but needed better tools for managing and editing them. So we built Imagor Studio — open source, self-hosted, built on years of development from vipsgen to imagor.

features.virtualScrollingGallery: Virtual Scrolling Gallery — browse thousands of images instantly, no indexing or waiting
features.imageEditing: Image Editing — multi-layer compositing, template workflows with instant URL generation
features.dragAndDrop: Drag-and-Drop Management — upload, organize, multi-select for bulk operations
features.nonDestructiveWorkflow: Non-Destructive Workflow — originals untouched, all transformations via URL

license.supportOngoingDevelopment: No subscriptions. No vendor lock-in. Your support enables continued development.

users.title: Users
users.createUserDescription: Add a new user to the system. They will be able to log in with the provided credentials.
users.editUserDescription: Update user information. Changes will be applied immediately.
users.deactivateUserDescription: Are you sure you want to deactivate
users.deactivateUserWarning: This will prevent the user from logging in
users.reactivateUserWarning: This will allow the user to log in again
users.searchPlaceholder: Search users by name or username...

messages.usernameAlreadyExists: This username is already in use

spaces.title: Spaces
spaces.createSpaceDescription: Create a dedicated image workspace for your team.
spaces.editSpaceDescription: Update space configuration. Changes will be applied immediately.
spaces.deleteSpaceDescription: Are you sure you want to permanently delete space
spaces.emptyDescription: Create an image workspace for your team.
spaces.credentialsEncrypted: Credentials are encrypted at rest using AES-256 and never exposed after saving.

storageTypeDesc.managed: Stored in Imagor Studio. No bucket setup required.

spaces.keyDescription: This sets your space URL in the app and its dedicated imagor host. You can change it later.

messages.createSpaceForbidden: You do not have permission to create spaces.
messages.spaceLimitReached: Your current plan has reached its space limit.
messages.deleteSpaceForbidden: Only organization admins can delete this space.

validation.keyFormat: URL slug must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens

spaces.processingUsageComingSoon: Processing usage will be shown here once the backend exposes a usage metric.
spaces.startDescription: You can customize storage, delivery, and access as you grow.

spacePropagation.title: Changes are propagating
spacePropagation.description: Changes usually go live within 30 seconds.
spacePropagation.createDescription: The new space is being published to processing nodes and is usually ready within 30 seconds.
spacePropagation.deleteDescription: Space removal is propagating to processing nodes and may take up to 30 seconds to fully take effect.

gallery.description: Customize gallery display and behaviour for this space. Space-level settings override the platform defaults.

branding.title: Branding
branding.description: App title and link shown in the editor for this space. Overrides the platform default (requires license).
branding.appTitleDescription: Custom app title shown in the navigation bar when browsing this space. Overrides the platform default (requires license).
branding.appUrlDescription: URL opened when the app title is clicked while browsing this space.

general.name: Display Name
general.nameDescription: The name shown in the navigation and spaces list.
general.updateForbidden: You do not have permission to manage this space.
general.customDomainDescription: Custom domain for this space. If left empty, served at {{spaceKey}}.imagor.app.
general.customDomainActiveDescription: This hostname is active for generated image URLs.
general.customDomainFeedbackSaved: Thanks. We saved your interest for the custom domain beta.

storage.description: View storage settings for this space.
storage.managedDescription: Your files are stored in Imagor Studio. This storage option is set when the space is created and cannot be changed later.
storage.bucketLocked: Bucket, region, and path prefix are fixed at creation time and cannot be changed.
storage.endpointDescription: Custom S3-compatible endpoint URL. Leave blank for AWS S3.
storage.prefixDescription: Optional path prefix inside the bucket (e.g. media/).
storage.accessKeyIdDescription: Leave blank to keep existing credentials.
storage.secretKeyDescription: Leave blank to keep existing credentials.
storage.urlSigningDescription: HMAC signing for secure imagor transformation URL generation.
storage.imagorSecretDescription: Used to sign imagor transformation URLs. Leave blank to keep the existing secret.
storage.signerAlgorithmDescription: HMAC algorithm used to sign transformation URLs.
storage.signerTruncateDescription: Shorten the URL signature to this length in characters. Smaller values make URLs shorter but reduce security. Use 0 for the full signature.

danger.deleteDescription: Once deleted, all configuration for this space is permanently removed. Files in your S3 bucket are not affected.

members.inviteDescription: Share by email. Existing users get access right away, even if they belong to another organisation. New people still receive an email invitation.
members.addExistingDescription: Or quickly add someone who is already in your organisation.
members.inviteHelp: Existing accounts are added to this space immediately. New people still need an email invitation to accept access.

inviteErrors.alreadyHasAccess: This person already has access to this space.
inviteErrors.notConfigured: Email invitations are not configured yet.
inviteErrors.unavailable: Sharing is not available in this deployment.
inviteErrors.default: Could not share this space right now. Please try again.

members.memberPlaceholderEmpty: Everyone in your organisation already has explicit access
members.sharedDescription: Everyone in this organisation can view and copy this space. The list below shows people who were added directly to this space, while organisation admins still manage settings and sharing.
members.emptyDescription: No one has been added directly to this space yet. Organisation admins still have inherited access.
members.removeSelfNotAllowed: You cannot remove yourself from this space.
members.removeDescription: Are you sure you want to remove

imagor.signerTruncateDescription: Shorten the URL signature to this length in characters. Smaller values make URLs shorter but reduce security. Use 0 for the full signature.

imagor.corsOriginsHelp: Enter a comma-separated list of origins, for example: https://editor.customer.test, https://cms.customer.test

footerText: Built on top of {{uiLink}}. The source code is available on {{githubLink}}.

modeDescriptions.smart: Smart crop to fill dimensions with content detection

output.targetSize: Target: {{size}} - Quality will be automatically reduced to meet this limit
